list.name: provider
list.label: Cloud provider
list.description: Scope execution health to one cloud (M12.4). 'All' spans every cloud.
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT provider FROM v_execution_health_by_provider ORDER BY 1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT provider FROM v_execution_health_by_provider ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Avg success rate
panels.description: Mean per-policy success rate. Zero when nothing has executed.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(t.success_rate), 4), 0) AS "Success rate" FROM (SELECT ROUND(COUNT(e.execution_id) FILTER (WHERE e.status = 'succeeded')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(e.execution_id), 0), 4) AS success_rate FROM policies p JOIN policy_executions e ON e.policy_id = p.id LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.subscription_id = e.subscription_id WHERE COALESCE(s.provider, 'azure') LIKE '$provider' GROUP BY p.id) t
SELECT COUNT(e.execution_id) AS "Executions" FROM policy_executions e LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.subscription_id = e.subscription_id WHERE COALESCE(s.provider, 'azure') LIKE '$provider'

SELECT COUNT(e.execution_id) FILTER (WHERE e.status = 'failed') AS "Failed" FROM policy_executions e LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.subscription_id = e.subscription_id WHERE COALESCE(s.provider, 'azure') LIKE '$provider'

panels.title: Avg duration
panels.description: Mean per-policy execution duration (finished runs only).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(t.avg_duration_seconds), 3), 0) AS "Avg duration" FROM (SELECT COALESCE(ROUND((AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.finished_at - e.started_at))) FILTER (WHERE e.finished_at IS NOT NULL))::numeric, 3), 0) AS avg_duration_seconds FROM policies p JOIN policy_executions e ON e.policy_id = p.id LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.subscription_id = e.subscription_id WHERE COALESCE(s.provider, 'azure') LIKE '$provider' GROUP BY p.id) t

SELECT p.name AS policy_name, ROUND(COUNT(e.execution_id) FILTER (WHERE e.status = 'succeeded')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(e.execution_id), 0), 4) AS success_rate FROM policies p JOIN policy_executions e ON e.policy_id = p.id LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.subscription_id = e.subscription_id WHERE COALESCE(s.provider, 'azure') LIKE '$provider' GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY success_rate ASC, policy_name ASC

SELECT e.started_at AS time, p.name AS metric, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.finished_at - e.started_at)) AS value FROM policy_executions e JOIN policies p ON e.policy_id = p.id LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.subscription_id = e.subscription_id WHERE e.finished_at IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(s.provider, 'azure') LIKE '$provider' ORDER BY e.started_at

panels.title: Execution health by provider
panels.description: Cross-cloud rollup (M12.4): engine health per Azure/AWS/GCP.

targets.rawSql: SELECT provider, total_executions, succeeded, failed, success_rate, avg_duration_seconds, last_status, last_execution_at FROM v_execution_health_by_provider WHERE provider LIKE '$provider' ORDER BY provider ASC

SELECT p.name AS policy_name, COUNT(e.execution_id) AS total_executions, COUNT(e.execution_id) FILTER (WHERE e.status = 'succeeded') AS succeeded, COUNT(e.execution_id) FILTER (WHERE e.status = 'failed') AS failed, ROUND(COUNT(e.execution_id) FILTER (WHERE e.status = 'succeeded')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(e.execution_id), 0), 4) AS success_rate, COALESCE(ROUND((AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.finished_at - e.started_at))) FILTER (WHERE e.finished_at IS NOT NULL))::numeric, 3), 0) AS avg_duration_seconds, (ARRAY_AGG(e.status ORDER BY e.started_at DESC, e.execution_id DESC))[1] AS last_status, MAX(e.started_at) AS last_execution_at FROM policies p JOIN policy_executions e ON e.policy_id = p.id LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.subscription_id = e.subscription_id WHERE COALESCE(s.provider, 'azure') LIKE '$provider' GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY last_execution_at DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT e.binding_id AS binding_id, COUNT(e.execution_id) AS total_executions, COUNT(e.execution_id) FILTER (WHERE e.status = 'succeeded') AS succeeded, COUNT(e.execution_id) FILTER (WHERE e.status = 'failed') AS failed, ROUND(COUNT(e.execution_id) FILTER (WHERE e.status = 'succeeded')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(e.execution_id), 0), 4) AS success_rate, COALESCE(ROUND((AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.finished_at - e.started_at))) FILTER (WHERE e.finished_at IS NOT NULL))::numeric, 3), 0) AS avg_duration_seconds, (ARRAY_AGG(e.status ORDER BY e.started_at DESC, e.execution_id DESC))[1] AS last_status, MAX(e.started_at) AS last_execution_at FROM policy_executions e LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.subscription_id = e.subscription_id WHERE e.binding_id IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(s.provider, 'azure') LIKE '$provider' GROUP BY e.binding_id ORDER BY last_execution_at DESC NULLS LAST
